title: Jsqueri
compiled_truth: Jsqueri is an external contact at [Gmssr](companies/gmssr). Over the corpus period (1999-09-24 to 2001-11-03), Jsqueri sent 3 and received 72 emails, totalling 75 interactions. Top correspondents: [Jeff Dasovich](people/jeff-dasovich) (3), [Robert Frank](people/robert-frank) (1), [William Gang](people/william-gang) (1).
